SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?organization rdfs:label "South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation" @en .
  ?organization wdt:P571 ?date .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| date                                |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1985-12-08T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
